property.name: dfs.replication
property.description: Default block replication. The actual number of replications can be specified when the file is created.

property.name: dfs.blocksize
property.description: The default block size for new files, in bytes. 128 MB is the standard for modern Hadoop clusters to balance metadata heap size with high-throughput processing.

property.name: dfs.namenode.name.dir
property.description: Path on the local filesystem where the NameNode stores the namespace and transactions logs persistently.

property.name: dfs.datanode.data.dir
property.description: Determines where on the local filesystem a DataNode should store its blocks.

property.name: dfs.permissions.enabled
property.description: If true, enable permission checking in HDFS. If false, permission checking is turned off (all operations succeed).

property.name: dfs.namenode.datanode.registration.ip-hostname-check
property.description: If true, NameNode checks that a DataNode's IP resolves to its reported hostname during registration. Often set to false in cloud/Docker setups.

property.name: dfs.heartbeat.interval
property.description: The interval in seconds between DataNode heartbeats to the NameNode.

property.name: dfs.blockreport.intervalMsec
property.description: Determines block report interval in milliseconds.
